draw:frame.draw:name: Picture Placeholder 4
draw:frame.svg:desc: A close-up of a wood grain

text:list-item.text:p: Institutions, facilities, incidents, and billing in one platform
Centralized incident reporting tied to institutions and facilities
Role-based access for owners, admins, and facility teams
Follow-up tracking with status, notes, and accountability
Subscription-aware limits for members, facilities, and AI usage
Government teams move from siloed reports to coordinated action
AI insights analyze incident volume, patterns, and facility hotspots:
Built-in governance keeps the platform operationally trusted:
Admin controls and blocked IP response
Register security facilities by county and type
Capture incidents with geolocation and follow-ups
AI summaries return KPIs, anomalies, and recommended actions:
Filter by institution, facility, and date
Faster triage and clearer accountability across agencies
Decision-makers get real-time visibility into incidents, follow-up gaps, and emerging hotspots
Doria combines operations, governance, and AI in one workflow.
The platform is structured around measurable modules that teams can adopt quickly.
Track stations, posts, and DCI offices
Begin incident capture and follow-up workflows
Enable AI summaries and anomaly reviews
Apply entitlements, quotas, and admin controls
Built for institutions, facilities, and response teams
